summary: Iteration 144: Notification System with Email Integration - All tests PASSED. Backend APIs (GET /api/notifications/counts, GET /api/notifications/unread-ids/{event_type}, POST /api/notifications/mark-read) working correctly. Email integration verified: decision_rendered emails sent via Resend API to both parties with email_sent=True in user_notifications and logged in email_attempts collection. Frontend correctly displays red badges on Decisions navbar link, blue dots on unread decision cards, and marks notifications as read when viewing detail pages. Mobile navigation shows notification dot on hamburger menu.

critical_code_review_comments: notification_service.py: Idempotent notification creation (lines 33-39) prevents duplicate notifications
notification_service.py: email_sent field tracks email delivery status (lines 50, 58-63)
notification_service.py: was_email_sent() check prevents duplicate emails (lines 66-72)
notification_service.py: notify_decision_rendered() sends emails to both parties (lines 169-231)
notification_service.py: notify_dispute_opened() sends emails with dispute_update idempotency key (lines 234-277)
notification_service.py: notify_dispute_escalated() uses separate 'dispute_escalated' key for email idempotency (lines 308-351)
notification_service.py: notify_dispute_position_submitted() is in-app only, no email (lines 280-305)
declarative_service.py: Notification triggers integrated at correct points (open_dispute, resolve_dispute, submit_position, escalation)
AppNavbar.js: Correctly fetches notification counts on mount and every 30 seconds (lines 59-73)
DecisionsListPage.js: Fetches unread IDs and applies blue styling to unread cards (lines 26-34, 64-69)
DecisionDetailPage.js: Marks notification as read on mount (line 40)
DisputesListPage.js: Fetches unread IDs for dispute_update type (lines 57-64)
DisputeDetailPage.js: Marks dispute notification as read on mount (line 50)

test_credentials.participant: igaal@hotmail.com / Test123! (role=user, had 3 unread decision notifications)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded notifications and email_attempts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system with email integration fully implemented and tested. Email integration verified: decision_rendered emails sent via Resend API with status=success. email_attempts collection logs all sent emails with email_type field. user_notifications collection has email_sent=True and email_sent_at for notifications where emails were sent. No active disputes exist currently (all resolved), so dispute_opened and dispute_escalated emails cannot be tested with live data - they will be triggered when new disputes are created. The notification triggers (open_dispute, submit_position, escalation, resolve_dispute) are integrated in declarative_service.py. Login route is /signin. Rate limiting is 10 requests per minute on login endpoint.

email_integration_verification.resend_api_integration: Working - emails sent via Resend with response IDs
email_integration_verification.idempotency_verified: email_sent field in user_notifications prevents duplicate emails
email_integration_verification.position_submission_no_email: notify_dispute_position_submitted() is in-app only per strategy matrix
